requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs SAE J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与SAE J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與SAE J1772 / CCS1

summary.en: Belize is a 60 Hz US-heritage Americas market. The applicable practical EV connector baseline is SAE J1772 Type 1 for AC charging and CCS Combo 1 (CCS1) for DC fast charging. IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 should not be assumed for Belize, and GB/T connectors are not physically compatible with the expected vehicle inlets. Connector requirements may be written into a BBS, BEL, site-owner, tender, or charge-point-operator specification, but the engineering starting point for Belize should be J1772 / CCS1.
summary.zh: 伯利兹属于60 Hz美国体系美洲市场。适用的实务电动汽车接口基线为交流充电SAE J1772 Type 1和直流快充CCS Combo 1（CCS1）。不得假设伯利兹采用IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2，GB/T接口也与预期车辆接口在物理上不兼容。接口要求可能写入BBS、BEL、场地方、招标文件或充电点运营商规范，但伯利兹的工程起点应为J1772 / CCS1。
summary.zht: 貝里斯屬於60 Hz美國體系美洲市場。適用的實務電動汽車接口基線為交流充電SAE J1772 Type 1和直流快充CCS Combo 1（CCS1）。不得假設貝里斯採用IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2，GB/T接口也與預期車輛接口在物理上不兼容。接口要求可能寫入BBS、BEL、場地方、招標文件或充電點運營商規範，但貝里斯的工程起點應為J1772 / CCS1。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — AC conductive charging coupler used in North America and Americas 60 Hz markets
CCS Combo 1 / CCS1 — DC fast-charging connector used in North America and Americas 60 Hz markets
IEC 62196-2 — includes Type 1 and Type 2 AC coupler families as dimensional references
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS configurations
Project-specific BBS, BEL, site-owner, tender, or CPO connector specification

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and DC connectors are physically incompatible with SAE J1772 Type 1 and CCS1. China DC charging also uses GB/T 27930 CAN communication, which is not the CCS communication stack. A connector swap alone may not be sufficient because control pilot behavior, proximity signaling, locking, cable rating, thermal rise, PLC communication, labels, and test reports may all change.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流和直流接口与SAE J1772 Type 1及CCS1在物理上不兼容。中国直流充电还采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，并非CCS通信栈。仅更换接口可能不足，因为控制导引、接近信号、锁止、电缆额定值、温升、PLC通信、标签和测试报告均可能改变。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流和直流接口與SAE J1772 Type 1及CCS1在物理上不兼容。中國直流充電還採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，並非CCS通訊棧。僅更換接口可能不足，因為控制導引、接近信號、鎖止、電纜額定值、溫升、PLC通訊、標籤和測試報告均可能改變。

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Belize. Hardware conversion to SAE J1772 Type 1 for AC and CCS1 for DC is required for the US-heritage Americas connector ecosystem unless a specific project states otherwise. Redesign should cover coupler, inlet/outlet geometry, cable assembly, locking, proximity/control pilot signaling, DC communication, temperature sensing, labels, spare parts, and accredited test evidence. GB/T-to-J1772 or GB/T-to-CCS1 adapters should not be treated as a conformity substitute.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不具备伯利兹接口就绪性。除非具体项目另有说明，面向美国体系美洲接口生态，交流须硬件转换为SAE J1772 Type 1，直流须转换为CCS1。重新设计应覆盖耦合器、插座/插头几何、电缆组件、锁止、接近/控制导引信号、直流通信、温度感测、标签、备件和认可测试证据。GB/T转J1772或GB/T转CCS1转接器不应被视为合规替代。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不具備貝里斯接口就緒性。除非具體項目另有說明，面向美國體系美洲接口生態，交流須硬體轉換為SAE J1772 Type 1，直流須轉換為CCS1。重新設計應覆蓋耦合器、插座/插頭幾何、電纜組件、鎖止、接近/控制導引信號、直流通訊、溫度感測、標籤、備件和認可測試證據。GB/T轉J1772或GB/T轉CCS1轉接器不應被視為合規替代。

mandatory_status.target: Project-critical — SAE J1772 / CCS1 are the applicable practical connector expectations for Belize's 60 Hz US-heritage Americas market; confirm final connector wording with BBS, BEL, tender, owner, or CPO before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 applies to China domestic connector design and is not a physical substitute for SAE J1772 / CCS1

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Belize, use SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC as the connector baseline. Do not specify IEC Type 2 / CCS2 or GB/T unless the project expressly requires it. GB/T connectors cannot plug into J1772 or CCS1 vehicle inlets.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对伯利兹，应以SAE J1772交流和CCS1直流作为接口基线。除非项目明确要求，不应指定IEC Type 2 / CCS2或GB/T。GB/T接口无法插入J1772或CCS1车辆接口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對貝里斯，應以SAE J1772交流和CCS1直流作為接口基線。除非項目明確要求，不應指定IEC Type 2 / CCS2或GB/T。GB/T接口無法插入J1772或CCS1車輛接口。
